description_long: This is a compact, sporty coupe car with a bold, angular design and a bright orange exterior. The front features a prominent hood scoop and a metallic engine detail, suggesting a performance-oriented build. The car has two doors, a sloped roofline, and a large rear spoiler, enhancing its aerodynamic profile. The windows are tinted light blue, and the side mirrors are black, matching the trim and rear wing. The rear of the car displays a louvered window and dual exhausts, with some visible wiring detail on the left side. The wheels are black, and the overall finish is slightly worn, giving it a rugged, street-racing appearance.
description: A bright orange, two-door coupe car with a hood scoop, rear spoiler, and sporty, angular styling. It features tinted windows, black trim, and a rugged, performance-focused look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the hood scoop, metallic engine detail, and rectangular headlights.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the two-door coupe profile, sloped roof, and large rear spoiler.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the louvered rear window, dual exhausts, and visible wiring detail.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, with visible door, window, and rear spoiler details.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
